nasb.text: The priest shall return on the seventh day and make an inspection. If the mark has indeed spread in the walls of the house,

esv.text: And the priest shall come again on the seventh day, and look. If the disease has spread in the walls of the house,

cnv.text: 第七天，祭司要回來察看，如果發現病症在房屋的牆上蔓延，

ccb.text: 第七天，祭司要回去检查。若发现墙壁上的霉斑蔓延，
